notes: Public Health Law & Bioethics scan. 10 niches confirmed blue ocean. 0 duplicates filtered: []. Key finding: Every niche in this domain (public health law, bioethics, reproductive rights, mental health law, vaccine law, end-of-life law, drug policy, research ethics, healthcare regulation) has ZERO exact-match streak apps despite enormous professional and civic audiences. Reproductive rights law and news-driven niches have 50M+ combined community reach. Research ethics is especially actionable: CITI Program monopoly on captive student/researcher audience with terrible UX (2.9 stars, 420 reviews) — a well-designed streak app could capture this market. Healthcare regulation has highest direct WTP: compliance officers and healthcare attorneys pay $200+ for single CE courses.
